notes: Example only. Keep real target names, emails, LinkedIn URLs, phone numbers, and company-private notes in validation/private/ and out of git. These entries are anonymized buyer archetypes for planning a 30-target outreach block.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Must justify remediation order for exposed product or edge software under customer pressure.
targets.planned_ask: Ask for workflow discovery call, not demo.
targets.next_action: Find warm intro through founder network.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Owns remediation choices for edge-facing product families and has to brief customer risk.
targets.planned_ask: Ask how they prove which product exposure class moves first.
targets.next_action: Ask advisor for intro to product security owner.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Maintains deployable environments where patch windows and mission impact are constrained.
targets.planned_ask: Ask about the last time scanner findings had to become a leadership-ready decision.
targets.next_action: Request intro from defense-tech founder.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs evidence that a hardening decision protects mission continuity, not only CVSS severity.
targets.planned_ask: Ask whether mission owners trust current vulnerability prioritization artifacts.
targets.next_action: Send mission-assurance discovery note.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Has too many scanner findings and must translate priority into owner-ready remediation packets.
targets.planned_ask: Ask where scanner output stops and manual evidence assembly starts.
targets.next_action: Find intro through security operator network.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs an asset and SBOM basis for why one product family is first in line.
targets.planned_ask: Ask whether they can share sanitized workflow shape without raw artifacts.
targets.next_action: Ask portfolio founder for a product-security intro.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Must defend prioritization choices to executives and government customers during high-pressure vulnerability events.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what evidence leadership trusts when exposure tools disagree.
targets.next_action: Send concise ICP-specific note.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs policy-bounded proof for why compensating controls are acceptable before full remediation.
targets.planned_ask: Ask about evidence needed for exceptions, mitigations, and hardening sequence.
targets.next_action: Ask for intro through architecture peer.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Has SBOM metadata but still needs to connect it to prioritization and customer evidence.
targets.planned_ask: Ask whether SBOM outputs change remediation order or mainly satisfy reporting.
targets.next_action: Find intro through supply-chain security contact.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Coordinates asset owners, product teams, and vulnerability managers after urgent CVE pressure.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what packet is copied into tickets and leadership updates.
targets.next_action: Send discovery note focused on evidence packet burden.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs leadership-ready evidence for why one exposure class matters first.
targets.planned_ask: Ask whether evidence-backed prioritization is real or already solved.
targets.next_action: Send short discovery note.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Advises programs that need clear vulnerability priority evidence but may not own budget.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what evidence package mission owners currently request.
targets.next_action: Ask academic network for advisor intro.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Must connect cyber exposure decisions to resilience and service continuity language.
targets.planned_ask: Ask how they translate vulnerability urgency into mission-owner action.
targets.next_action: Send resilience-focused discovery ask.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs audit-ready rationale for remediation sequence under customer or oversight pressure.
targets.planned_ask: Ask whether current reports answer why this first.
targets.next_action: Ask for intro from public-sector security contact.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Turns threat context into remediation and detection asks but lacks asset-specific evidence.
targets.planned_ask: Ask how CTI evidence is converted into tickets and detection review.
targets.next_action: Find intro through SOC leader network.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs safe handoff templates that analysts can review without trusting an opaque recommendation.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what SOC needs before accepting a prioritization handoff.
targets.next_action: Send SOC workflow discovery note.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Receives broad detection asks and needs evidence to decide which review template matters first.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what evidence makes a detection handoff actionable.
targets.next_action: Ask detection engineer for peer intro.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs to reduce alert and ticket noise while keeping escalation rationale reviewable.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what current SIEM or ticket artifacts fail to explain.
targets.next_action: Send operator-focused discovery ask.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Owns prioritization queue and must explain exceptions, urgency, and asset relevance.
targets.planned_ask: Ask for the last painful prioritization event before showing Prophet.
targets.next_action: Request intro from CISO network.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Already uses risk scoring but may still assemble leadership evidence manually.
targets.planned_ask: Ask whether current risk scoring produces an auditable packet or only a queue.
targets.next_action: Send incumbent-check discovery note.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Coordinates owner follow-through and needs proof attached to remediation tasks.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what evidence makes owners act faster.
targets.next_action: Ask security PM network for intro.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Reports progress but may lack a defensible rationale for why work was sequenced.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what metric or packet executives trust during urgent exposure pressure.
targets.next_action: Send metrics-focused discovery ask.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Supports federal-adjacent platforms with mixed customer requirements and evidence expectations.
targets.planned_ask: Ask how they package prioritization evidence for customer review.
targets.next_action: Ask integrator contact for platform-security intro.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs customer-safe artifacts that do not expose raw telemetry or operational details.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what customer-safe evidence can be shared during vulnerability pressure.
targets.next_action: Send customer-evidence discovery note.

targets.hypothesized_pain: May care about audit trails and hashes but may be one step removed from budget.
targets.planned_ask: Ask which artifacts would help an assessor or customer trust the decision.
targets.next_action: Send compliance-evidence discovery ask.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Small team has scanner output but little time to assemble buyer-trust evidence.
targets.planned_ask: Ask whether a narrow evidence packet would help sales and security review.
targets.next_action: Ask defense-tech founder for security lead intro.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Owns remediation but must satisfy security review without over-sharing environment details.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what safe metadata they could provide for a pilot.
targets.next_action: Send metadata-boundary discovery note.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Has constrained remediation windows and needs evidence to justify compensating control order.
targets.planned_ask: Ask whether exposure class prioritization is more useful than asset-level scanning.
targets.next_action: Ask industrial security contact for intro.

targets.hypothesized_pain: Needs a concise executive artifact that explains why the security team chose a hardening sequence.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what would make a prioritization decision defensible to leadership.
targets.next_action: Find warm intro through operator network.

targets.hypothesized_pain: May own the cross-team handoff from vulnerability queue to SOC and platform action.
targets.planned_ask: Ask what handoff breaks when prioritization is urgent.
targets.next_action: Send leadership-handoff discovery note.
